headline: 3 Dividend Aristocrats That Look Cheap and Just Hiked Payouts
summary: Aristocrats that have recently extended their streak for at least one more year include Sysco, Colgate-Palmolive, and Chubb.

headline: Rothschild & Co Upgrades Colgate-Palmolive to Buy, Raises Price Target to $100
summary: Rothschild & Co  analyst Edward Lewis   upgrades Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) from Neutral to Buy and raises the price target from $93 to $100.
